description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, standard barrel with a front post iron sight and a slanted muzzle device at the tip. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, while the stock, pistol grip, and handguard are made from polished wood. The magazine is ribbed and metallic, designed to hold multiple rounds. The rifle's overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws, levers, and a charging handle on the side. The combination of wood and metal gives it a traditional, rugged appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features a long barrel, iron sights, and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile, alignment of the barrel, and the width of the stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same wooden and metal features, with the magazine and trigger assembly visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the handguard, magazine, and the alignment of the barrel.
